title: lessons.md per-entry shape (v1)
description: Per splock implplan §M.impl.5. Codifies the H2-block markdown shape per `docs/plans/<slug>/lessons.md` entry. SOLE source of truth for the 7-field per-entry contract. v2.7 ships v1; future bumps via lessons_v2.schema.json.

date.description: ISO-8601 date from the H2 header. Auto-stamped by `bin/lessons add`.

title.description: One-line failure title from the H2 header (after the ISO date + em-dash).

task.description: Task identifier (T-prefixed integer). Cross-refs `(slug, task_id)` in the orchestrator substrate.

approach.description: Non-empty paragraph: what approach was attempted.

failure_mode.description: Non-empty paragraph: how the attempt failed.

rejection.description: Non-empty paragraph: why the approach was rejected (root-cause, not symptom).

reattempt.description: Non-empty paragraph: conditions under which the approach might become viable again.

source.description: Pointer to source-of-truth: _orchestrator_log.jsonl line number, morning-review entry, or git commit hash.
